extraction.one_line_summary: ALAPHILIPPE Julian attacked solo 26km out on final climb approach, overcame mechanical, held 35-second gap to favorites despite Sunweb/INEOS chase.
tactical_patterns: Wellens established 6-minute break sitting 1:10 GC to gain virtual yellow, forcing extended peloton response throughout stage.
ALAPHILIPPE attacked 26km out despite mechanical issue, gap stabilized at 35 seconds suggesting chasing group coordination failure.
Sunweb led chase for MATTHEWS sprint despite GC threats in group, prioritizing stage over protecting time gaps.
TEUNISSEN lost 2 minutes on final climbs after ASTANA paced aggressively, revealing Jumbo-Visma TTT winner fragility on terrain.

rider_signals.WELLENS Tim: positive: solo attacked from break with 30km remaining after establishing virtual yellow, took KOM points before caught
rider_signals.TEUNISSEN Mike: negative: dropped 2 minutes on final 50km climbs, losing yellow after holding through TTT stage
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: neutral: Sunweb worked chase for him but only managed second, suggesting team prioritization over individual climbing form
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: still suffering crash effects from stage 1, struggling in gruppetto on hilly stage
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: present in strong 35-second chase group behind Alaphilippe, showing early GC positioning
